creator: jean.debogue@gmail.com
text:
When I boot FreeBSD 6.2 the wireless keyboard doesn't work.  It's a
microsoft wireless comfort keyboard model: 1045

When at the login prompt nothing is working on the keyboard but, the
wireless mouse is working.

If I use any other operating system it seems to work fine. Also, I used
FreeBSD 6.0 and 6.1 and it wasn't doing it.

It seems only FreeBSD 6.2 has that bug.

Fix: 

To fix the problem I unplug the ps/2 keyboard from the keyboard port and
plug it back in. As soon as it is plug back the keyboard rework.
How-To-Repeat: Boot with the keyboard and mouse wireless kit.
